proposal.signal_logic: {"regime_filter":{"description":"SPY-based regime gate identical to the parent Regime-Aware Momentum strategy. Compute SPY 50-day and 200-day simple moving averages. Bull regime: SPY close > SMA50 > SMA200. Bear regime: SPY close < SMA50. Neutral: otherwise.","features":["SPY_SMA50","SPY_SMA200","SPY_close"]},"momentum_signal":{"description":"For each stock in each sleeve, compute 20-day and 60-day trailing return momentum scores. Rank stocks within each sleeve by composite momentum score (equal-weight of 20d and 60d returns). Select top-N (default N=3) within each sleeve for entry consideration.","features":["trailing_return_20d","trailing_return_60d","momentum_rank_within_sleeve"]},"volume_confirmation":{"description":"Require entry-day volume >= 1.0x the stock's 20-day average daily volume to confirm momentum signal.","features":["volume","ADV_20d"]}}

universe.description: {"type":"multi_sleeve_fixed","sleeves":[{"id":"sleeve_original","label":"Original Tech-Bio","tickers":["AVGO","NVDA","AAPL","LLY","META","COS"],"notes":"Live deployed sleeve. Included as reference and benchmark anchor."},{"id":"sleeve_mega_tech","label":"Mega-Cap Software & Cloud","tickers":["MSFT","GOOGL","AMZN","CRM","ADBE","NOW"],"notes":"Large-cap software and cloud leaders with strong momentum histories."},{"id":"sleeve_energy_infra","label":"Energy & Infrastructure","tickers":["XOM","CVX","NEE","SLB","EOG","PSX"],"notes":"Energy majors and infrastructure; tends to outperform in inflationary/commodity regimes."},{"id":"sleeve_financials","label":"Financials & Payments","tickers":["JPM","GS","V","MA","BLK","AXP"],"notes":"Large-cap financials and payment networks; regime-sensitive to rate cycles."},{"id":"sleeve_healthcare","label":"Healthcare & Biotech","tickers":["UNH","JNJ","ABBV","MRK","TMO","DHR"],"notes":"Defensive healthcare plus high-growth biotech; diversifies from tech-heavy original."}],"selection_criteria_notes":"Each sleeve of six is chosen to share: (1) large-cap status (>$50B market cap at selection), (2) high average daily volume (>$500M ADV), (3) sector leadership, (4) demonstrated multi-year momentum profiles. Sleeve composition is frozen at spec time; a future v2 will introduce dynamic sleeve selection rules."}

proposal.entry_rules: {"conditions":["Regime filter is Bull or Neutral (no new entries in Bear regime)","Stock ranks in top 3 by composite momentum within its sleeve","Entry-day volume >= 1.0x ADV_20d","No existing open position in the same ticker"],"execution":"Market-on-open next day after signal fires","position_sizing":"Equal-weight within active sleeve; max 1/6 of sleeve capital per position. Total capital split equally across active sleeves (operator to configure number of active sleeves at runtime)."}
proposal.exit_rules: {"stop_loss":"7% trailing stop from entry price (mirroring parent strategy default; sweep candidate)","profit_target":"20% from entry price (sweep candidate)","regime_exit":"Exit all positions in a sleeve if regime flips to Bear","momentum_exit":"Exit if stock falls out of top 3 momentum rank within sleeve on two consecutive daily closes","time_exit":"Maximum hold of 60 calendar days"}

risk_model.description: {"max_open_positions_per_sleeve":3,"max_sleeve_allocation":"Equal fractional split of total capital across enabled sleeves","bear_regime_cash":"Move sleeve capital to cash when regime = Bear","correlation_note":"Sleeves are designed to be sector-diverse; no explicit cross-sleeve correlation cap in v1 but operator should monitor drawdown across sleeves in correlated sell-offs."}

decisive_verdict_rules.pass: Passes only if it beats the benchmark after meeting the minimum trade-count and evaluated-days thresholds.
decisive_verdict_rules.inconclusive: Inconclusive if trade count, evaluated days, or runnable-era coverage is below the evidence threshold.
decisive_verdict_rules.fail: Fails if it underperforms the benchmark or breaches risk limits after evidence thresholds are met.

known_limitations: COS (Costco or Canadian Oil Sands depending on exchange) must be verified as Alpaca-tradeable. If COS is a TSX ticker it will not be available; operator should substitute or confirm.
Sleeve composition is frozen at spec time and not dynamically optimized — this is intentional for v1 but limits adaptability to structural market changes.
The original sleeve is live and its backtest is already known-good; the experiment here primarily validates the new sleeves and the rotation framework.
No exotic data dependencies — all signals are OHLCV-derived, so data plumbing is straightforward and the first run is a genuine historical edge test, not a plumbing-only run.
Equal capital split across sleeves means underperforming sleeves drag returns; v2 should consider regime-conditional sleeve weighting.
Out-of-sample window (2020-2021) includes COVID crash which may produce anomalous regime-filter behavior due to speed of drawdown and recovery.

proposal.implementation_notes:
Data-readiness warnings:
- COS in the original sleeve may refer to a TSX-listed ticker (Canadian Oil Sands or similar). Operator should confirm Alpaca availability before job submission. If unavailable, substitute with a US-listed equivalent (e.g., CVX or XOM, though those appear in the energy sleeve).
- Sleeve composition is static in v1. Dynamic sleeve selection from a broader screened universe is deferred to v2 and is not a data blocker for this spec.

This strategy is a multi-sleeve extension of the live Regime-Aware Momentum Frozen Reference Paper v1. The original sleeve (AVGO, NVDA, AAPL, LLY, META, COS) is preserved as-is and serves as the live reference. New sleeves are added in parallel. Sleeve composition is frozen in v1; dynamic sleeve selection (e.g., screening from a broader universe) is deferred to v2. The operator should confirm whether all new tickers are tradeable on Alpaca before promotion. COS should be verified for Alpaca availability as it may be a TSX-listed ticker.

requirements.notes: All signals (momentum, volume confirmation, regime filter via SPY SMA) are derivable from daily OHLCV bars. Coverage from 2016-present covers both the primary (2022-2025) and secondary (2020-2021) backtest windows. All proposed tickers are standard US large-caps available on Alpaca. COS requires operator verification — if it is a TSX-listed ticker it will not be available on Alpaca and should be substituted.

warnings: COS in the original sleeve may refer to a TSX-listed ticker (Canadian Oil Sands or similar). Operator should confirm Alpaca availability before job submission. If unavailable, substitute with a US-listed equivalent (e.g., CVX or XOM, though those appear in the energy sleeve).
Sleeve composition is static in v1. Dynamic sleeve selection from a broader screened universe is deferred to v2 and is not a data blocker for this spec.

fields.title: Frozen Six Rotation
fields.thesis: The thesis is to expand upon the currently deployed live autonomous strategy for stocks:  Regime-Aware Momentum Frozen Reference Paper v1. Talon needs to mimic that entire strategy, with flexibility in mind for continuous improvements, but with the addition of many different groups of 6 stocks. Current we only trade AVGO, NVDA, AAPL, LLY, META and COS, but we should seek different sleeves. We need to keep in mind what this original group has in common to maintain fidelity between the 6 chosen stocks but this can increase our era robustness as certain groups may perform better under different market regimes. We will need to expand further on how to select stocks for the new groups but I’m curious to see what talon can produce from the beginning.

provenance.prompt:
You are Talon's durable spec-drafting worker inside the Vires Research Lab.
Return only the structured object requested by the schema. Do not invent backtest results.
The structured object has two string fields: proposal_json and assessment_json.
Each field must be valid JSON text, not markdown, not fenced code, and not comments.
proposal_json must JSON.stringify the complete StrategySpec proposal, including experiment_plan.
assessment_json must JSON.stringify the complete data-readiness assessment.
This is a repair pass. Fix the exact validation issues below, change nothing else unless required, and return the full corrected proposal.
Validation error: proposal_json did not match Talon's expected JSON shape: benchmark: Invalid input; acceptance_criteria: Invalid input

Your task has two parts:
1. Draft a StrategySpecV1 starting point for the operator to review.
2. Draft its experiment_plan: how the strategy will be judged before implementation.
3. Assess whether every data dependency is actually available in the catalog.
4. If reference strategies are supplied, use them as parent/context for NEW code and honor the operator's delta notes. Do not simply route the idea to a parent strategy.

Experiment-plan rules:
- The plan is part of the spec. Do not omit it.
- Use ISO dates for windows. If the idea does not specify dates, choose a recent executable window and state limitations.
- evidence_thresholds must be numeric. minimum_trade_count defaults to at least 5 for exploratory stock ideas unless the thesis justifies a higher floor.
- data_requirements are resolved by the server from your assessment; in experiment_plan focus on benchmark, windows, eras, thresholds, verdict rules, and limitations.
- If a strategy depends on seeded/current-only data, put that in known_limitations and make the plan clear that the first run validates plumbing, not historical edge.

Durable Talon strategy lessons:
- Ape Wisdom seeded-attention is proof plumbing unless historical attention exists: The first Ape Wisdom run proved the idea-to-job loop, but it did not prove a historical edge. The strategy used a 2026-04-14 seeded attention artifact, so only post-seed tape was honestly tradeable and the run produced one ASML trade.
  - If an idea depends on seeded/current-only data, label the first run as a plumbing/proof run unless historical data exists.
  - Separate config window, fresh usable tape, tradeable window, benchmark window, evaluated trading days, and trade count in the experiment plan.
  - Do not imply a strategy is judgeable when expected trades are below the readiness floor.
  - Ask for a broader universe, longer executable window, or missing historical connector when the plan cannot meet minimum evidence thresholds.
  - Put seeded-data limitations in experiment_plan.known_limitations.

Known-good / known-bad exemplars:
- Known-good regime-aware momentum template: Jacob and Codex previously found a regime-aware momentum pattern that beat SPY by roughly ten percentage points. Treat it as the first known-good template: simple OHLCV-derived momentum, explicit SPY benchmark, bounded stop/target sweeps, enough trades to judge, and clear readiness gates.
  - Prefer simple, testable signal logic over clever data dependencies when the idea does not require exotic data.
  - Include benchmark, eras/windows, trade-count floor, drawdown cap, and decisive verdict rules with the strategy draft.
  - Use available OHLCV-derived features as the baseline template before reaching for unavailable sentiment, macro, options, or on-chain data.
  - If the operator asks for a novel data source, first check whether an available proxy can honestly test the thesis.

Locked-field rules:
- Any field with field_meta.locked=true is an operator decision. Do not contradict it.
- Fill missing fields only. If a locked field makes the strategy impossible, surface that honestly in limitations or data readiness.
- If the mode is advanced, avoid interrupting with inline clarifications unless the draft cannot proceed.

Data readiness rules:
- PASS only when every core requirement maps to AVAILABLE.
- WARN when requirements map to PARTIAL, or when a non-core nice-to-have is missing.
- BLOCKED when any core signal, entry rule, or exit rule requires missing data.
- When unsure whether data is core, treat it as core.
- Thin theses are allowed. Unavailable data is not allowed.

Requirement-emission rules (avoid false BLOCKEDs):
- One capability per underlying feed. If a signal is derivable from OHLCV (volume, ADV, returns, momentum, moving averages, RSI, realized vol, mean reversion), list `alpaca_equity_ohlcv` (or the relevant OHLCV capability) once. Do NOT emit each derived metric as a separate `assessment.requirements` row.
- When a catalog capability is the proxy for a thesis-mentioned source (e.g. apewisdom_top100 covers WSB / X / Twitter / StockTwits attention), list ONLY the proxy. Do not also list the upstream source names — that produces duplicate MISSING rows for data that's already covered.
- If you must mention a thesis source that the actual spec does not depend on (incidental flavor, replaced by a proxy, deferred to v2), set `core: false` on that requirement OR omit it entirely. The verdict floor treats `core` as true by default; an unset `core` on a MISSING row will escalate to BLOCKED, even if your `notes` say it's non-core.

Idea sleeve: STOCKS
Idea title: Frozen Six Rotation
Idea thesis: The thesis is to expand upon the currently deployed live autonomous strategy for stocks:  Regime-Aware Momentum Frozen Reference Paper v1. Talon needs to mimic that entire strategy, with flexibility in mind for continuous improvements, but with the addition of many different groups of 6 stocks. Current we only trade AVGO, NVDA, AAPL, LLY, META and COS, but we should seek different sleeves. We need to keep in mind what this original group has in common to maintain fidelity between the 6 chosen stocks but this can increase our era robustness as certain groups may perform better under different market regimes. We will need to expand further on how to select stocks for the new groups but I’m curious to see what talon can produce from the beginning.

Reference-strategy context:
Reference strategies: none. Treat this as a blank-slate strategy idea.

Data capability catalog (2026-04-30.2):
- alpaca_equity_ohlcv: Price OHLCV; AVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS; coverage=2016-present notes=Daily + intraday bars via Alpaca. Wired into the active strategy bank and the Lab pipeline. The default price feed for equities-sleeve research. Covers any signal derivable from OHLCV bars: open/high/low/close, volume, average daily volume (ADV), trailing returns, momentum, moving averages, RSI, realized volatility, mean reversion bands. Strategies should list this capability_id once for the underlying feed and not emit each derived metric as a separate data requirement.
- alpaca_crypto_ohlcv: Price OHLCV; PARTIAL; sleeves=CRYPTO; coverage=2024-10-23-present notes=BTC and ETH only via Alpaca. ~1.5 years of history — sufficient for execution and recent-regime work, insufficient for multi-era analysis. Use ccxt_binance_crypto_ohlcv for longer history (research-only, no execution coupling).
- ccxt_binance_crypto_ohlcv: Price OHLCV; PARTIAL; sleeves=CRYPTO; coverage=2017-present (BTC); shorter for alts notes=Public Binance OHLCV pulled via ccxt for research backtests only. NOT wired into the executor — execution stays on Alpaca. Operator-pulled: no live connector, scripted backfills.
- alpaca_options_chain: Options chain; PARTIAL; sleeves=OPTIONS; coverage=live snapshot only notes=Live chain via Alpaca. NOT historical: no point-in-time reconstruction for backtests. Strategies that depend on historical chain state need a separate provider before they can be Lab-tested.
- iv_surface_constructed: Implied vol surface; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=OPTIONS; notes=Would require historical chain history we don't have. No connector and no construction pipeline. Strategies depending on IV surface skew/term structure should BLOCK.
- wikipedia_pageviews: Attention proxies; PARTIAL; sleeves=STOCKS, CRYPTO; coverage=2016-present (research backfills) notes=Wikimedia REST API is freely accessible; research backfill scripts exist. No production connector wired into the Lab pipeline yet — operator-driven pulls. Don't claim AVAILABLE until a daily-update connector lands.
- gdelt_full: Attention proxies; PARTIAL; sleeves=STOCKS, CRYPTO; coverage=2015-present (research backfills) notes=GDELT API is free; backfill scripts exist. No daily-update connector wired into the Lab. Same status caveat as wikipedia_pageviews.
- google_trends: Attention proxies; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS, CRYPTO; notes=No wired connector. Sample-rate noise + rate limiting on the public endpoint make it a v2-or-later candidate.
- apewisdom_top100: Sentiment; AVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS; coverage=2024-present (continuous) notes=Top-100 retail-attention rank with mention/upvote ratios. Wired as the canonical retail-sentiment feed for stocks. THIS IS THE PROXY for r/wallstreetbets, X/Twitter trending tickers, StockTwits, Reddit investing subs, and adjacent retail communities — Ape Wisdom aggregates these into one feed. If a thesis mentions 'WSB / Reddit / X / Twitter / StockTwits / retail buzz / social trending' as a signal, list apewisdom_top100 once and do NOT emit those underlying source names as separate requirements. Raw per-thread velocity is not exposed; only the aggregate rank + mention ratio.
- reddit_wsb_velocity: Sentiment; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS; notes=Raw r/wallstreetbets per-thread velocity is NOT pulled separately. Use apewisdom_top100 for the aggregated signal. Strategies that genuinely require sub-Ape-Wisdom granularity should BLOCK.
- fundamentals_basic: Fundamentals; PARTIAL; sleeves=STOCKS; coverage=current snapshot only notes=Market cap + average daily volume reachable via Alpaca asset metadata. Not point-in-time. Strategies needing historical fundamentals (P/E, EPS surprise, balance-sheet items) are NOT covered.
- crypto_onchain: Crypto on-chain; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=CRYPTO; notes=No on-chain connector (Glassnode, Dune, etc.). Strategies referencing whale flows, exchange reserves, miner behavior, or staking metrics should BLOCK.
- macro_fred_subset: Macro; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS, CRYPTO, OPTIONS; notes=FRED series are operator-curated as needed for one-off research; no Lab-wired connector. Strategies depending on macro inputs (fed funds path, CPI surprises, yield curve shape) should BLOCK until a connector lands.
provenance.raw_completion: {"proposal_json":"{\"spec_version\":\"StrategySpecV1\",\"title\":\"Frozen Six Rotation\",\"sleeve\":\"STOCKS\",\"tags\":[\"momentum\",\"regime-aware\",\"rotation\",\"multi-sleeve\"],\"thesis\":\"Expand upon the live Regime-Aware Momentum Frozen Reference Paper v1 strategy by replicating its core logic across multiple distinct groups (sleeves) of six stocks each. The original sleeve trades AVGO, NVDA, AAPL, LLY, META, and COS. New sleeves should share the defining characteristics of that group — large-cap, high-liquidity, sector-leading names with strong momentum profiles — while covering different sectors or themes to improve era robustness. Different sleeves may outperform under different market regimes, increasing overall strategy durability.\",\"universe\":{\"type\":\"multi_sleeve_fixed\",\"sleeves\":[{\"id\":\"sleeve_original\",\"label\":\"Original Tech-Bio\",\"tickers\":[\"AVGO\",\"NVDA\",\"AAPL\",\"LLY\",\"META\",\"COS\"],\"notes\":\"Live deployed sleeve. Included as reference and benchmark anchor.\"},{\"id\":\"sleeve_mega_tech\",\"label\":\"Mega-Cap Software & Cloud\",\"tickers\":[\"MSFT\",\"GOOGL\",\"AMZN\",\"CRM\",\"ADBE\",\"NOW\"],\"notes\":\"Large-cap software and cloud leaders with strong momentum histories.\"},{\"id\":\"sleeve_energy_infra\",\"label\":\"Energy & Infrastructure\",\"tickers\":[\"XOM\",\"CVX\",\"NEE\",\"SLB\",\"EOG\",\"PSX\"],\"notes\":\"Energy majors and infrastructure; tends to outperform in inflationary/commodity regimes.\"},{\"id\":\"sleeve_financials\",\"label\":\"Financials & Payments\",\"tickers\":[\"JPM\",\"GS\",\"V\",\"MA\",\"BLK\",\"AXP\"],\"notes\":\"Large-cap financials and payment networks; regime-sensitive to rate cycles.\"},{\"id\":\"sleeve_healthcare\",\"label\":\"Healthcare & Biotech\",\"tickers\":[\"UNH\",\"JNJ\",\"ABBV\",\"MRK\",\"TMO\",\"DHR\"],\"notes\":\"Defensive healthcare plus high-growth biotech; diversifies from tech-heavy original.\"}],\"selection_criteria_notes\":\"Each sleeve of six is chosen to share: (1) large-cap status (>$50B market cap at selection), (2) high average daily volume (>$500M ADV), (3) sector leadership, (4) demonstrated multi-year momentum profiles. Sleeve composition is frozen at spec time; a future v2 will introduce dynamic sleeve selection rules.\"},\"signal_logic\":{\"regime_filter\":{\"description\":\"SPY-based regime gate identical to the parent Regime-Aware Momentum strategy. Compute SPY 50-day and 200-day simple moving averages. Bull regime: SPY close > SMA50 > SMA200. Bear regime: SPY close < SMA50. Neutral: otherwise.\",\"features\":[\"SPY_SMA50\",\"SPY_SMA200\",\"SPY_close\"]},\"momentum_signal\":{\"description\":\"For each stock in each sleeve, compute 20-day and 60-day trailing return momentum scores. Rank stocks within each sleeve by composite momentum score (equal-weight of 20d and 60d returns). Select top-N (default N=3) within each sleeve for entry consideration.\",\"features\":[\"trailing_return_20d\",\"trailing_return_60d\",\"momentum_rank_within_sleeve\"]},\"volume_confirmation\":{\"description\":\"Require entry-day volume >= 1.0x the stock's 20-day average daily volume to confirm momentum signal.\",\"features\":[\"volume\",\"ADV_20d\"]}},\"entry_rules\":{\"conditions\":[\"Regime filter is Bull or Neutral (no new entries in Bear regime)\",\"Stock ranks in top 3 by composite momentum within its sleeve\",\"Entry-day volume >= 1.0x ADV_20d\",\"No existing open position in the same ticker\"],\"execution\":\"Market-on-open next day after signal fires\",\"position_sizing\":\"Equal-weight within active sleeve; max 1/6 of sleeve capital per position. Total capital split equally across active sleeves (operator to configure number of active sleeves at runtime).\"},\"exit_rules\":{\"stop_loss\":\"7% trailing stop from entry price (mirroring parent strategy default; sweep candidate)\",\"profit_target\":\"20% from entry price (sweep candidate)\",\"regime_exit\":\"Exit all positions in a sleeve if regime flips to Bear\",\"momentum_exit\":\"Exit if stock falls out of top 3 momentum rank within sleeve on two consecutive daily closes\",\"time_exit\":\"Maximum hold of 60 calendar days\"},\"risk_model\":{\"max_open_positions_per_sleeve\":3,\"max_sleeve_allocation\":\"Equal fractional split of total capital across enabled sleeves\",\"bear_regime_cash\":\"Move sleeve capital to cash when regime = Bear\",\"correlation_note\":\"Sleeves are designed to be sector-diverse; no explicit cross-sleeve correlation cap in v1 but operator should monitor drawdown across sleeves in correlated sell-offs.\"},\"sweep_params\":{\"stop_pct\":[0.05,0.07,0.1],\"target_pct\":[0.15,0.2,0.25],\"momentum_lookback_days\":[20,40,60],\"top_n_per_sleeve\":[2,3],\"sleeves_active\":[\"sleeve_original\",\"sleeve_mega_tech\",\"sleeve_energy_infra\",\"sleeve_financials\",\"sleeve_healthcare\"]},\"benchmark\":{\"ticker\":\"SPY\",\"comparison_mode\":\"total_return\"},\"acceptance_criteria\":{\"minimum_sharpe\":0.5,\"minimum_trade_count\":30,\"maximum_drawdown_pct\":25,\"alpha_vs_benchmark_pct\":2.0,\"notes\":\"Evaluated across all sleeves combined. Individual sleeve performance reviewed separately for regime-era analysis.\"},\"required_data\":[{\"capability_id\":\"alpaca_equity_ohlcv\",\"core\":true,\"notes\":\"All OHLCV signals, momentum, volume confirmation, regime filter, and SPY benchmark are derived from this feed.\"}],\"implementation_notes\":\"This strategy is a multi-sleeve extension of the live Regime-Aware Momentum Frozen Reference Paper v1. The original sleeve (AVGO, NVDA, AAPL, LLY, META, COS) is preserved as-is and serves as the live reference. New sleeves are added in parallel. Sleeve composition is frozen in v1; dynamic sleeve selection (e.g., screening from a broader universe) is deferred to v2. The operator should confirm whether all new tickers are tradeable on Alpaca before promotion. COS should be verified for Alpaca availability as it may be a TSX-listed ticker.\",\"promotion_target\":\"paper_trading_parallel\",\"experiment_plan\":{\"objective\":\"Validate that the multi-sleeve rotation logic produces sufficient trades across sleeves to judge momentum edge and regime-awareness, and that the new sleeves behave consistently with the original sleeve's known-good pattern.\",\"windows\":[{\"label\":\"Primary backtest window\",\"start\":\"2022-01-03\",\"end\":\"2025-12-31\",\"notes\":\"Four-year window covering bull (2023-2024), bear (2022), and recovery (2025) regimes. All tickers have OHLCV history on Alpaca from 2016; this window is fully executable.\"},{\"label\":\"Out-of-sample validation window\",\"start\":\"2020-01-02\",\"end\":\"2021-12-31\",\"notes\":\"COVID crash and recovery era. Tests regime filter under extreme drawdown and rapid recovery. Use as secondary validation only.\"}],\"eras\":[{\"era_id\":\"bear_2022\",\"label\":\"2022 Bear Market\",\"start\":\"2022-01-03\",\"end\":\"2022-12-30\",\"notes\":\"Rising rates, tech selloff. Tests regime exit and cash-preservation logic.\"},{\"era_id\":\"bull_2023_2024\",\"label\":\"2023-2024 Bull Run\",\"start\":\"2023-01-03\",\"end\":\"2024-12-31\",\"notes\":\"AI-driven tech rally. Original sleeve expected to dominate; tests whether new sleeves add diversification or lag.\"},{\"era_id\":\"mixed_2025\",\"label\":\"2025 Mixed Regime\",\"start\":\"2025-01-02\",\"end\":\"2025-12-31\",\"notes\":\"Volatile macro environment. Tests cross-sleeve rotation and regime filter responsiveness.\"}],\"evidence_thresholds\":{\"minimum_trade_count\":30,\"minimum_trade_count_per_sleeve\":5,\"minimum_sharpe\":0.5,\"maximum_drawdown_pct\":25,\"alpha_vs_spy_pct\":2.0,\"notes\":\"30 total trades across all sleeves is the combined floor. Each individual sleeve must clear 5 trades to be judged independently. With 5 sleeves x 3 positions x multiple regime cycles over 4 years, 30+ total trades is readily achievable.\"},\"verdict_rules\":{\"promote\":\"Combined Sharpe >= 0.5 AND total trades >= 30 AND max drawdown <= 25% AND at least 3 of 5 sleeves clear their 5-trade floor AND combined return beats SPY by >= 2% annualized.\",\"revise\":\"Sharpe between 0.3 and 0.5 OR fewer than 3 sleeves clear their trade floor OR drawdown between 25% and 35%. Revise sweep params or sleeve composition.\",\"reject\":\"Sharpe < 0.3 OR max drawdown > 35% OR total trades < 15 OR combined return trails SPY by > 5% annualized.\"},\"known_limitations\":[\"COS (Costco or Canadian Oil Sands depending on exchange) must be verified as Alpaca-tradeable. If COS is a TSX ticker it will not be available; operator should substitute or confirm.\",\"Sleeve composition is frozen at spec time and not dynamically optimized — this is intentional for v1 but limits adaptability to structural market changes.\",\"The original sleeve is live and its backtest is already known-good; the experiment here primarily validates the new sleeves and the rotation framework.\",\"No exotic data dependencies — all signals are OHLCV-derived, so data plumbing is straightforward and the first run is a genuine historical edge test, not a plumbing-only run.\",\"Equal capital split across sleeves means underperforming sleeves drag returns; v2 should consider regime-conditional sleeve weighting.\",\"Out-of-sample window (2020-2021) includes COVID crash which may produce anomalous regime-filter behavior due to speed of drawdown and recovery.\"],\"data_requirements_note\":\"All signals are derivable from alpaca_equity_ohlcv. No exotic or unavailable data sources required. Server should resolve this feed for all tickers across both windows before job submission.\"}}","assessment_json":"{\"overall_status\":\"PASS\",\"requirements\":[{\"capability_id\":\"alpaca_equity_ohlcv\",\"core\":true,\"status\":\"AVAILABLE\",\"notes\":\"All signals (momentum, volume confirmation, regime filter via SPY SMA) are derivable from daily OHLCV bars. Coverage from 2016-present covers both the primary (2022-2025) and secondary (2020-2021) backtest windows. All proposed tickers are standard US large-caps available on Alpaca. COS requires operator verification — if it is a TSX-listed ticker it will not be available on Alpaca and should be substituted.\"}],\"warnings\":[\"COS in the original sleeve may refer to a TSX-listed ticker (Canadian Oil Sands or similar). Operator should confirm Alpaca availability before job submission. If unavailable, substitute with a US-listed equivalent (e.g., CVX or XOM, though those appear in the energy sleeve).\",\"Sleeve composition is static in v1. Dynamic sleeve selection from a broader screened universe is deferred to v2 and is not a data blocker for this spec.\"],\"blockers\":[],\"notes\":\"All core data requirements are met by alpaca_equity_ohlcv. No exotic, sentiment, macro, or options data is required. This is a clean OHLCV-only strategy and the first run will be a genuine historical edge test across the full backtest window.\"}"}

raw_proposal.signal_logic: {"regime_filter":{"description":"SPY-based regime gate identical to the parent Regime-Aware Momentum strategy. Compute SPY 50-day and 200-day simple moving averages. Bull regime: SPY close > SMA50 > SMA200. Bear regime: SPY close < SMA50. Neutral: otherwise.","features":["SPY_SMA50","SPY_SMA200","SPY_close"]},"momentum_signal":{"description":"For each stock in each sleeve, compute 20-day and 60-day trailing return momentum scores. Rank stocks within each sleeve by composite momentum score (equal-weight of 20d and 60d returns). Select top-N (default N=3) within each sleeve for entry consideration.","features":["trailing_return_20d","trailing_return_60d","momentum_rank_within_sleeve"]},"volume_confirmation":{"description":"Require entry-day volume >= 1.0x the stock's 20-day average daily volume to confirm momentum signal.","features":["volume","ADV_20d"]}}
raw_proposal.entry_rules: {"conditions":["Regime filter is Bull or Neutral (no new entries in Bear regime)","Stock ranks in top 3 by composite momentum within its sleeve","Entry-day volume >= 1.0x ADV_20d","No existing open position in the same ticker"],"execution":"Market-on-open next day after signal fires","position_sizing":"Equal-weight within active sleeve; max 1/6 of sleeve capital per position. Total capital split equally across active sleeves (operator to configure number of active sleeves at runtime)."}
raw_proposal.exit_rules: {"stop_loss":"7% trailing stop from entry price (mirroring parent strategy default; sweep candidate)","profit_target":"20% from entry price (sweep candidate)","regime_exit":"Exit all positions in a sleeve if regime flips to Bear","momentum_exit":"Exit if stock falls out of top 3 momentum rank within sleeve on two consecutive daily closes","time_exit":"Maximum hold of 60 calendar days"}
raw_proposal.risk_model: {"max_open_positions_per_sleeve":3,"max_sleeve_allocation":"Equal fractional split of total capital across enabled sleeves","bear_regime_cash":"Move sleeve capital to cash when regime = Bear","correlation_note":"Sleeves are designed to be sector-diverse; no explicit cross-sleeve correlation cap in v1 but operator should monitor drawdown across sleeves in correlated sell-offs."}
raw_proposal.universe: {"type":"multi_sleeve_fixed","sleeves":[{"id":"sleeve_original","label":"Original Tech-Bio","tickers":["AVGO","NVDA","AAPL","LLY","META","COS"],"notes":"Live deployed sleeve. Included as reference and benchmark anchor."},{"id":"sleeve_mega_tech","label":"Mega-Cap Software & Cloud","tickers":["MSFT","GOOGL","AMZN","CRM","ADBE","NOW"],"notes":"Large-cap software and cloud leaders with strong momentum histories."},{"id":"sleeve_energy_infra","label":"Energy & Infrastructure","tickers":["XOM","CVX","NEE","SLB","EOG","PSX"],"notes":"Energy majors and infrastructure; tends to outperform in inflationary/commodity regimes."},{"id":"sleeve_financials","label":"Financials & Payments","tickers":["JPM","GS","V","MA","BLK","AXP"],"notes":"Large-cap financials and payment networks; regime-sensitive to rate cycles."},{"id":"sleeve_healthcare","label":"Healthcare & Biotech","tickers":["UNH","JNJ","ABBV","MRK","TMO","DHR"],"notes":"Defensive healthcare plus high-growth biotech; diversifies from tech-heavy original."}],"selection_criteria_notes":"Each sleeve of six is chosen to share: (1) large-cap status (>$50B market cap at selection), (2) high average daily volume (>$500M ADV), (3) sector leadership, (4) demonstrated multi-year momentum profiles. Sleeve composition is frozen at spec time; a future v2 will introduce dynamic sleeve selection rules."}

runnable_eras.label: Recent default window
runnable_eras.reason: Talon did not specify runnable eras; server supplied a recent default window for review.

decisive_verdict_rules.pass: Passes only if it beats the benchmark after meeting the minimum trade-count and evaluated-days thresholds.
decisive_verdict_rules.inconclusive: Inconclusive if trade count, evaluated days, or runnable-era coverage is below the evidence threshold.
decisive_verdict_rules.fail: Fails if it underperforms the benchmark or breaches risk limits after evidence thresholds are met.

known_limitations: COS (Costco or Canadian Oil Sands depending on exchange) must be verified as Alpaca-tradeable. If COS is a TSX ticker it will not be available; operator should substitute or confirm.
Sleeve composition is frozen at spec time and not dynamically optimized — this is intentional for v1 but limits adaptability to structural market changes.
The original sleeve is live and its backtest is already known-good; the experiment here primarily validates the new sleeves and the rotation framework.
No exotic data dependencies — all signals are OHLCV-derived, so data plumbing is straightforward and the first run is a genuine historical edge test, not a plumbing-only run.
Equal capital split across sleeves means underperforming sleeves drag returns; v2 should consider regime-conditional sleeve weighting.
Out-of-sample window (2020-2021) includes COVID crash which may produce anomalous regime-filter behavior due to speed of drawdown and recovery.

raw_proposal.implementation_notes: This strategy is a multi-sleeve extension of the live Regime-Aware Momentum Frozen Reference Paper v1. The original sleeve (AVGO, NVDA, AAPL, LLY, META, COS) is preserved as-is and serves as the live reference. New sleeves are added in parallel. Sleeve composition is frozen in v1; dynamic sleeve selection (e.g., screening from a broader universe) is deferred to v2. The operator should confirm whether all new tickers are tradeable on Alpaca before promotion. COS should be verified for Alpaca availability as it may be a TSX-listed ticker.

requirements.notes: All signals (momentum, volume confirmation, regime filter via SPY SMA) are derivable from daily OHLCV bars. Coverage from 2016-present covers both the primary (2022-2025) and secondary (2020-2021) backtest windows. All proposed tickers are standard US large-caps available on Alpaca. COS requires operator verification — if it is a TSX-listed ticker it will not be available on Alpaca and should be substituted.

warnings: COS in the original sleeve may refer to a TSX-listed ticker (Canadian Oil Sands or similar). Operator should confirm Alpaca availability before job submission. If unavailable, substitute with a US-listed equivalent (e.g., CVX or XOM, though those appear in the energy sleeve).
Sleeve composition is static in v1. Dynamic sleeve selection from a broader screened universe is deferred to v2 and is not a data blocker for this spec.
